chapters.text: Jesu Christa soh, Jacob naopa Jude chun Pa Pathen ngailut changte ho chengse le Jesu Christa a dinga kikoi akikouho chengse heng’ah,
hepina le lungmonna chule ngailutna nachunguvah hapunin pung hen.

Ngaite ho, ilhangpiuva huhhinga umna thudol’a nahenguva lekha hinsut kagot pettah-in masanga mitheng ho anakipedohsa tahsan lama chu ponpan dinga nangho tilkhou na a nahenguva hinsut ding khoh kasatan ahi.

Ajeh chu mi koi koiham guhthima hung kithol lut aummui; amaho chu hiche talen hi man dingdol ahiuve, tia masanga anakisunsa ahi. Amaho chu Pathen ngaisah lou ahiuve; i-Pathenu milungset chu huhna lamin asodohtauve, chule i-Pipu u le i-Pakaiyu khatseh Jesu Christa chu ajanom pouve.
Ahin nanghon thu hi khatvei nahetsau hita jongle, kahin geldohsah kit nomui, hichu Pakai chun Egypt gama kona amite ahuhdoh ahi, ahinla chuche nunga atahsan louho chu asugamhel jengin ahi.
Chule apiputna kol louva achennau dalha a Vantil ho chu aman niloupi chungnung nia athu tan dinga tonsot henna a ahen a muthim noiya akoi ahitai.

Chutobangma chu Sodom le Gomorrah chule akimvel’a khopi ho chengse amaho banga huh le jon-thanhoi patna lama akipumpeh jeh uva chule atipumu bol lamdanga umna dinga, akihabolna lamuva lamvaiya talen a tonsot meisa athoh gimuva vettoh dinga uma ahiuve.
Ahinla hite ho jong hin hiche mang chu amangmat pum pumun atahsapheu asuboh jiuve, chule thunei vaipoh nahsahmon abol jiuvin, loupina ho chu aseise jiuvin ahi.
Ahinla Mose long chung chang thudol’a Michael Vantil pipuipen diabol toh akinel chun athutana oimoa houset angam pon ahi; ahin Pakaiyin housen, atibouvin ahi.
Hiteho vang hin ahettoh louhel’u aseiset jiu ahi, chule lungthim neilou sa ho banga angaiya ahetsau hiti hoa chu kisusedena ahiuve.
Achungu abinge, ajeh iham itile amahon Cain lampi chu aho’uvin, chule thaman duchatnan Balaam lamvaina a alhaiyun, chule Korah mi nelna a chu mangthaijia ahiuve.

Amaho chu nangho toh an naneh khom komu le nakidei vahnauva chu twi noiya kisel songpi ahiuvin, kichatna neilou ama kivah kelngoi ching ahiuve; amaho twi ko lou meilhang hui mut lon le ahiuve; chavang laiya thingphung ga lou nivei thia ajunga kibotdoh ahiuve
amaho twikhanglen kinong ajachatnau twiphon sodoh ahiuve; ahsi vahle ho ahiuvin, amaho dinga muthim lhangkhal tonsot geiya dinga kikheh ahi.
Chujongle Adam a pat khang sagina Enoch chun hite ho chung chang thudola hi lhagaova thu aseidoh a, “veuvin, Pakai chu mi jouse thu tan dinga amitheng sang som sangja toh hunga ahi;

hichu Pathen ngaisah louho jousen Pathen ngaisah louna thilbol’a Pathen angaisah lounau thudol’a chule Pathen ngaisah lou chonse hon ama chunga thu hamtah tah aseiyu hichenga chu amaho chu lansan ding ahi,” ati ahi.
Amaho chu phunchel hat le oimoa seiset hat ahiuve; ama lung ngaichat lam cheh a chona ahiuve; akam sungun ham hoitho thu aseiyun; phatchom ngai nan kamsungin mi ajabolun ahi.
Ahin ngaite ho, tu masanga Pakai Jesu Christa solchah hon aseisau thuho chengse chu nanghon geldoh jingun;
amaho chun nangho jah a, “Ni nunung le mi nuisat nelphen hatte ho hung umdoh dingu ahi; amaho chu Pathen ngaisah louva ama ama lung ngaichat dungjui cheh a chon ding ahiuve.
Amaho chu loitum sem, tahsa hing, Lhagao neilou ahiuve.
Ahin ngaite ho, nangho vang natahsanu theng chunga chun nangma ho kisadoh-un, Lhagao Theng’ah tao taovun.
Pathen ngailutna chun kihongun, chule tonsot hin kemlouna dingin i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mihepina a kinemin kat jingin umun.
Chule mi abang aging cha lel a hepiuvin,
abang meiya konin loidoh loiyun huhhingun; abang kicha geh chan hepiuvin, tahsaphe suhboh boh be-na nihchen ponsil sanin theuvin,
Hiti chu hihen, nakipal lhuh louna dinguva nangho hongbit thei le ama loupina ang sunga nen beh louhel’a kipah tah a lhut theiya,
Pathen khatseh i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vangin, loupina, chungnunna, thahat thuneina jouse, phat um masangin jong, tun jong, chule tonsot geiyin ama jeng’ah um jing hen. Amen.
